teaching.role: Teaching Assistant, Organic Chemistry I & Lab
teaching.description: Mentored 120+ undergraduates; developed supplemental materials improving exam performance by 15%.

summary: PhD chemist/materials scientist with 6+ years in organic/materials chemistry, reaction and process optimization, and data-rich analytical characterization (NMR, LC-MS/GC-MS, FT-IR, GPC/SEC, TGA/DSC, DOE/SPC). Currently leading DOE-guided process development for bio-based polymer systems, translating experimental data into reproducible process windows and scale-up specifications.

bullets: Lead DOE-guided chemical process development for bio-based polymer systems, defining critical process parameters, material-quality readouts, and reproducible scale-up specifications.

Designed, synthesized, and characterized organic electrochromic materials, connecting molecular structure, purity, stability, and performance across 15+ variants with NMR/GPC, MS, spectroscopy, thermal analysis, and electrochemistry.
Drove process development for CVD-based molecular thin-film coatings, optimizing surface preparation and deposition conditions to improve reproducibility and optical performance.
Optimized CVD polymer thin-film deposition under flow using DOE and in-situ QCM-D monitoring to quantify growth kinetics and process controls.
Managed characterization/process-development lab operations for a 15-member group; implemented calibration, SOP, and safety systems that improved instrument uptime by 30%.

projects.title: Bio-Based Polymer Scale-Up Process
projects.description: Built DOE-guided process windows, analytical readouts, and material-quality specifications for reproducible polymer scale-up.
projects.tech: DOE, SPC, process variables, analytical characterization

projects.title: Electrochromic Molecular Design
projects.description: Designed and evaluated molecular variants through synthesis, purification, characterization, and property-driven iteration.
projects.tech: Organic synthesis, NMR, MS, FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, CV

projects.title: AFOSR Defense Thin-Film Coatings
projects.description: Converted early-stage coating concepts into controlled CVD process conditions and reproducible thin-film outputs.
projects.tech: CVD, QCM-D, surface prep, process optimization

skills.Materials: Bio-based polymers, electrochromic molecules, thin films, CVD coatings, surface functionalization
